privileged_info_summary: I confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated Sweet Home 3D file, 'auction_house_starter.sh3d', which is dynamically created from a built-in sample by stripping its interior furniture while preserving walls and doors. By reviewing the setup scripts and verifier logic, I verified that the evaluation correctly checks for the construction of interior walls (>=4) and doors (>=3), the definition of distinct zones (>=4 rooms), the placement of auction seating (>=20 chairs and >=1 desk), administrative areas (total >=24 chairs, >=3 desks), storage/display units (>=8), and ambient decor (>=5). These exactly match the requirements stated in the prompt and the metadata.
